item.title: Issue #2743 created
item.description:
Serialization parameters: discrepancies

I discovered minor deviations in the specs while adding the new indentation/newline parameters to all documents; namely:

  • fn:serialize uses item-delimiter instead of item-separator.
  • json-lines is missing in the XQuery spec.
  • RNC: escape-solidus and json-lines are missing.
  • XQFO: the canonical row’s interpretation says “true() means yes, false() means no” while it is “true/false” otherwise.

Now that I work through all documents – legwork is a funny word, it’s mostly sitwork – I would of course be happy if they were unified some day in the future…
